findings.issue: Redundant JSON.stringify calls with slice(0, 250) throughout button handlers for toast messages.
findings.suggestion: Create a helper function like `toastJson(d, limit = 250)` to avoid repeating JSON.stringify().slice() pattern across btn-replay, btn-sienna, btn-shift, btn-luke handlers.
findings.est_impact: Reduces code duplication and token overhead; 6 instances found (lines 654, 662, 670, 678, 708)

findings.issue: Variable `history` is declared and updated in chat function but never validated or used meaningfully.
findings.suggestion: Either enforce history length limits or remove the variable if it's not being consumed by the backend.
findings.est_impact: Clarifies intent; currently history array grows unbounded

findings.issue: loadTVWidget recreates the entire TradingView widget on every showPending call via setInterval(checkPendingSignal, 15000).
findings.suggestion: Cache the widget or only reload when ticker changes instead of clearing and recreating innerHTML on every check.
findings.est_impact: Reduces unnecessary DOM mutations and external script loads every 15 seconds

findings.issue: ws.onmessage silently catches all errors with try/catch but provides no logging or fallback for malformed JSON.
findings.suggestion: Log parse errors or invalid message types to console for debugging; add explicit handler for unrecognized data.type values.
findings.est_impact: Improves observability; silent failures can hide WebSocket issues
